subject: physics
title: 19M.1.HL.TZ2.2
question_html:
A proton has momentum 10-20 N s and the uncertainty in the position of the proton is 10-10 m. What is the minimum fractional uncertainty in the momentum of this proton?

A. 5 × 10-25

B. 5 × 10-15

C. 5 × 10-5

D. 2 × 104
examiners_html: Over 100 candidates left this blank. It is testing fractional uncertainty and also involves the Heisenberg uncertainty principle.
